prompt: A modern supermarket aisle with tall shelving units densely stocked with cereal boxes, breakfast packs, snacks, and pasta on both sides, yellow price tags on shelf edges, a smooth grey polished floor, overhead fluorescent panel lights, green aisle signs reading 'Dairy' and 'Frozen Foods' at the far end, and glass-doored refrigerators visible in the distance with shoppers browsing. Ahead past the dairy section, glass-doored upright freezers line the back wall holding frozen meals and ice cream. Behind the viewer, the aisle ends at a wooden end-cap promotional display stacked with discounted cereal boxes, beyond which the main cross-aisle leads to a row of checkout lanes with conveyor belts and bagging areas. A first-person shopper visible only as two hands and forearms gripping the chrome handle of a metal shopping cart, pushing it forward through the aisle. First-person view at eye level, looking straight down the supermarket aisle with the shopping cart handle and both hands visible in the foreground.

subject.desc: the embodied shopper in first-person POV, visible only as hands and forearms gripping the cart handle
subject.movement: The shopping cart will be propelled, following the movement of the subject.

scene_adherence.visible_part: A modern supermarket aisle has tall shelving units on both sides densely stocked with cereal boxes, breakfast packs, and snacks. Price tags are attached to the edges of the shelves. The aisle has a smooth grey polished floor. Overhead fluorescent panel lights are visible in the supermarket. Green signs reading 'Dairy' and 'Frozen Foods' are located at the far end of the aisle. Glass-doored refrigerators are visible in the distance, with shoppers browsing near them.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: The tall shelving units are also stocked with pasta. Ahead past the dairy section, glass-doored upright freezers line the back wall holding frozen meals and ice cream. Behind the viewer, the aisle ends at a wooden end-cap promotional display stacked with discounted cereal boxes. Beyond the promotional display, the main cross-aisle leads to a row of checkout lanes with conveyor belts and bagging areas.
